subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf and My Handmaiden! The longing of thy heart hath influenced the horizons, and thy lamentation hath filled with sorrow the dwellers of the pavilion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی حنین قلبت در آفاق تاثیر نموده و ناله ات اهل سرادق را محزون
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
